The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Dipterostele tanii include alkaloids, glycosides, and phenolic compounds, such as taniiine and dipterosteline, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
